zh: 【新手岛计时器：01分钟】
"以后或许搞一个海产品批发公司？还是说搞个海产零售店？"
"公司起个什么名字？姜海海产品批发？"
姜海现在已经胡思乱想起来了，毫不在意他现在也就仅仅抓住了一只螃蟹。
"放！收！放！收！放！收！"
姜海用意念控制背包格子里的螃蟹，一会儿放在眼前的沙滩上，然后又收回去，又放，又收。
螃蟹已经被收放得口吐白沫。
看到螃蟹动作开始变慢，挣扎迹象有点呆滞，姜海知道，螃蟹可能经不起这么折腾了。
停下这无聊的操作，继续四下观望。
这座海岛太大了，要发现任务螃蟹其实并不是件很容易的事情。
沙滩上螃蟹、贝壳、虾挺多，但再没看见有黄色名字框的螃蟹。
姜海一度怀疑是不是自己玩螃蟹的举动导致其他类似的螃蟹躲起来了？
还有个一个最关键问题，就是姜海尝试过抓别的，但发现并不能抓取这些其他种类的螃蟹、贝壳、虾、鱼等等到他的物品栏，这使得他一夜暴富的梦想又远了一点。
在眼前的海滩搜索无果，姜海决定向岛中央走去，他发现只有到了中央，才能再走到别的海滩。
因为，沿着沙滩一直走是不行的，不远处就有一些巨大的、深不见底的裂缝，阻隔了他的前进路线，这些裂缝直通中央山脉的半山腰。
沿路姜海也发现了一些破瓶子和罐子，这说明这个海岛还是经常有游客来的。
姜海不禁好奇起来，"不知道之前系统所提到的观光券怎么得到的"。
"虽然有24小时，但也不能磨蹭，不知道这海岛到底有多大，我的体力也有限"
姜海作为前世码农，自己有几斤几两还是清楚的。由于缺乏锻炼，跑5公里都连呼带喘的。现在让他去搜索一个大岛，任务螃蟹又不是一堆等着他去捡。
"难怪那个005号管理员看着我的表情有点古怪。"
回想起那个管理员说到新手岛任务时的神秘一笑，姜海越发觉得不对劲。难道有什么坑吗？
带着疑问，又看了看现在进度1/5的提示，姜海不由生起警惕之心。
【新手岛计时器：30分钟】
此时姜海已经到达岛中央区域，由于是上坡路，姜海有点气喘。
抬头一望，远处有个破帐篷。
"有人在这里野营？"
"既然有游客，那必定是游客留下的吧，但怎么感觉是个逃难的……"
走近看着这个破帐篷，姜海有点发愣。
朝帐篷里张望了了一下，姜海意外发现了第二只任务螃蟹。
【黄色名字框】
【种类：螃蟹 名字：蟹面】
"原来这个帐篷能挡住名字框，难怪远处是看不见的。"
看着这只还在慢吞吞横行的螃蟹，姜海毫不犹豫上前抓取。
【成功抓到1只螃蟹，当前任务进度2/5】
【奖励：技能点+1，经验+10】
【奖励神秘礼包 +1】
姜海暂时没搞懂技能点是干啥的，之前获得的属性点可能是可以增加自己各项能力。这神秘礼包倒是引起了姜海的好奇。
他在物品栏里选中了礼包，选择打开。
【成功抓到1只螃蟹，当前任务进度3/5】
【奖励：属性点+1，经验+10】
看着物品栏里，螃蟹图标上有个很小的数字3，姜海有点无语。
就这，
还神秘礼包。
【新手岛计时器：1小时05分钟】
姜海在岛上搜索了1个多小时，但有个现象引起他的注意，就是感觉自己的体力在源源不断的恢复。
虽然爬坡有点气喘，但疲劳劲也很快散去。在这个新手岛上的状态给他一种不真切的感觉，很是纳闷。
此时姜海走到一处泉眼旁边，泉眼不大，水质看上去也是晶莹剔透，还在不断涌出一些小气泡。
尝试着摸了一下，水温清凉，姜海忍不住捧了一点水拍打在脸上。
突然，哗一声。
一只任务螃蟹从泉眼里一窜而出，横行速度挺快。
【黄色名字框】
【种类：螃蟹 名字：蟹斑】
"啊哈，还有意外收获！"
"呆！你往哪里跑！"
姜海大喝一声，冲过去一把按住螃蟹蟹斑。
【成功抓到1只螃蟹，当前任务进度4/5】
【奖励：属性点+1，经验+10】
"还有1只就完成任务了"
姜海不由得欣喜。
但还没来得及起身，一阵尖锐的警告声响彻整个岛屿。
【警告，嘟~，警告，嘟~】
天色一刹那变得昏暗，周围暗红色的光线笼罩。
"什么情况，我触发了什么？"
en: [Novice Island Timer: 00:01]
*Maybe I should start a seafood wholesale business? Or a retail chain?*
*What do I even call it—Jiang Hai's Ocean Harvest?*
Jiang Hai's mind was already spiraling into startup fantasies. The fact that he had exactly one crab to his name? Utterly irrelevant.
"Deploy. Retrieve. Deploy. Retrieve. Deploy. Retrieve!"
He was mentally spamming his inventory, pulling the crab out onto the sand, sucking it back into the grid—over and over like a fidget toy.
The crab was foaming at the mouth.
Its movements slowed. The desperate thrashing turned sluggish, almost dazed. Jiang Hai realized: this crab could not survive his boredom.
He stopped the pointless loop and went back to scanning his surroundings.
The island was enormous. Finding task-crabs out here wasn't going to be a walk on the beach—literally.
The shoreline was crawling with crabs, shells, and shrimp. But yellow nameplates? None. Zero.
Jiang Hai actually wondered if his crab-torturing antics had spooked all the other task-crabs into hiding.

And there was a bigger problem: he'd tried grabbing the regular stuff. The non-task crabs, the shells, the shrimp, the fish—nothing went into his inventory. His get-rich-quick dream was rapidly receding.
With the current beach yielding nothing, Jiang Hai decided to head toward the island's interior. He figured the only way to reach other shorelines was through the center.

Walking along the coast was impossible—massive bottomless fissures cut across his path, gaping chasms that plunged all the way to the central mountain's mid-slope. Dead ends, every few hundred meters.
Along the way, he spotted broken bottles and rusty cans. Confirmation: tourists definitely came here.
"Wonder how you get one of those sightseeing passes the system mentioned," he mused.
"Twenty-four hours sounds generous, but I can't afford to dawdle. No idea how big this island actually is, and my stamina isn't exactly pro-athlete level."

Jiang Hai knew his limits. Former coder, current couch potato—a five-kilometer jog would leave him wheezing like a busted accordion. Now he was supposed to search an unknown island for crabs that weren't exactly lining up to be caught.
"No wonder Admin 005 gave me that weird look."
He replayed that cryptic smile in his mind. The way 005 had paused at the words "Novice Island." Something was off. Was there a catch he wasn't seeing?
He glanced at the 1/5 progress indicator. His guard went up.
[Novice Island Timer: 00:30]
Jiang Hai had reached the island's central zone. It was uphill the whole way—he was panting.
He lifted his gaze. A tattered tent stood in the distance.
*Someone camping out here?*
*Definitely left by a tourist... but honestly, this looks more like a refugee shelter.*
He approached, staring at the sad wreck of a tent.
He peeked inside—and froze.
[Yellow Nameplate]
[Species: Crab | Name: Crab Face]
*The tent was blocking the nameplate. No wonder I couldn't see it from outside.*
The crab was taking its sweet time, sidling along at a geriatric pace. Jiang Hai didn't give it a chance to react—he lunged.
[Ding]
[1 crab captured. Mission progress: 2/5.]
[Reward: Skill Point +1 | EXP +10]
[Reward: Mystery Gift Pack +1]
Jiang Hai still wasn't clear on what skill points did. The attribute points from earlier probably buffed his stats. But the Mystery Gift Pack? Now that was intriguing.
He focused on the gift pack in his inventory. Opened it.
[Ding]
[1 crab captured. Mission progress: 3/5.]
[Reward: Attribute Point +1 | EXP +10]
Jiang Hai: "......"
He stared at the inventory. The crab icon now had a tiny '3' in the corner. Dead silence.
That was it.
That was the 'mystery gift.'
[Novice Island Timer: 01:05]
Over an hour of searching and Jiang Hai had noticed something strange: his stamina kept regenerating.
Sure, the uphill trek had winded him, but the fatigue evaporated almost instantly. The whole experience on this island felt... unreal. He couldn't shake the uncanny feeling.
He found himself beside a small spring. Crystal-clear water, tiny bubbles rising from somewhere deep beneath.
He dipped a hand in—cold, refreshing. He couldn't resist splashing some onto his face.
SPLASH.
A task-crab burst from the spring like it had been launched from a cannon, skittering sideways at impressive speed.
[Yellow Nameplate]
[Species: Crab | Name: Crab Spot]
"Aha! Bonus round!"
"Stop right there, you sideways menace!"
Jiang Hai roared and pounced, slamming his palm down on Crab Spot.
[Ding]
[1 crab captured. Mission progress: 4/5.]
[Reward: Attribute Point +1 | EXP +10]
"One more and I'm done!"
A grin spread across Jiang Hai's face.
Before he could even stand up, a piercing alarm ripped across the entire island.
[WARNING—BWEE—WARNING—BWEE—]
The sky darkened in an instant. Everything was bathed in an ominous blood-red light.
"What the hell? What did I trigger?!"
